description: Cached LLM-generated replacement candidates for Round 4. Each candidate replaces one real-project source window and is judged only after parse, Terser, and size checks.

candidates.promptSummary: Rewrite this complete function into a shorter equivalent function. Preserve observable behavior and do not assume purity.

responses.name: single-return

candidates.promptSummary: Rewrite this anonymous function into a shorter equivalent function while preserving call order.

responses.name: conditional-concat

candidates.promptSummary: Rewrite this function into a shorter equivalent function. Keep fallback enumeration behavior.

responses.name: early-fallback

candidates.promptSummary: Rewrite this function into a shorter equivalent function. Preserve closure behavior.

responses.name: shared-return

candidates.promptSummary: Rewrite this function into a shorter equivalent function without changing return value.

responses.name: flat-index-test

candidates.promptSummary: Rewrite this function into a shorter equivalent function.

responses.name: one-line-loop
